Package minicp.engine.constraints

Class MaximumMatching

java.lang.Object
minicp.engine.constraints.MaximumMatching
public class MaximumMatching extends Object
Compute and Maintain a Maximum Matching in the variable-value graph

  • Method Details

    • compute

      public int compute(int[] result)
      Computes the maximum matching over the variables x Stores within the results array the value to which a variable is matched
      Parameters:
      result - array of size >= x. result[i] == value belonging to x[i], to which x[i] is matched
      Returns:
      size of the maximum matching
